task_completion.description: Verify that Palmer_Station was added as a ground station with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Station' configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Palmer_Station' with Latitude 64.7743 S (or -64.7743), Longitude 64.0539 W (or -64.0539), and Altitude 10m.

task_completion.description: Verify that Punta_Arenas was added as a ground station with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Ground Station' configuration window or list in GPredict showing 'Punta_Arenas' with Latitude 53.1548 S (or -53.1548), Longitude 70.9113 W (or -70.9113), and Altitude 37m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the PalmerComms module with the correct amateur radio satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module, tab, or configuration window named 'PalmerComms' that includes the satellites ISS (or ZARYA, NORAD 25544), SO-50 (NORAD 27607), and AO-85 (NORAD 40967).

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the PalmerWX module with the correct NOAA weather satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module, tab, or configuration window named 'PalmerWX' that includes the satellites NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), and NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591).

task_completion.description: Verify that both PalmerComms and PalmerWX modules are configured to use Palmer_Station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the module configuration windows or the main module views for PalmerComms and PalmerWX; the selected ground station (often shown in the module header or settings) must be 'Palmer_Station'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Palmer_Station is set as GPredict's default ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences/Settings window under 'Ground Stations' or 'General' showing 'Palmer_Station' selected as the default, or verify it is the active station upon opening a new default module.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict windows, menus, and dialog boxes being interacted with, rather than terminal commands editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown in the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict interface should be visible with the expected maps, satellite lists, and radar views, not just a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text document.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration must be reflected in the application's own settings dialogs or main display, proving actual software configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Palmer Station coordinates: 64.7743°S (-64.7743), 64.0539°W (-64.0539), altitude 10m. Punta Arenas coordinates: 53.1548°S (-53.1548), 70.9113°W (-70.9113), altitude 37m. Comms satellites (PalmerComms): ISS (NORAD 25544), SO-50 (NORAD 27607), AO-85 (NORAD 40967). Weather satellites (PalmerWX): NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591).
